products.name: Chocolate Chip Cookie
products.description: A golden, chewy classic loaded with melty chocolate chips and just the right buttery finish. The kind of cookie that tastes like merienda at home.
products.ingredients: Flour, butter, brown sugar, eggs, chocolate chips, vanilla, salt

products.name: Biscoff Cookie
products.description: A soft cookie with caramelized Biscoff flavor, cookie butter richness, and a cozy spiced crunch in every bite.
products.ingredients: Flour, butter, brown sugar, eggs, Biscoff spread, Biscoff crumbs, vanilla

products.name: Red Velvet Cookie
products.description: Velvety cocoa cookie with a soft red crumb and creamy white chocolate notes for a sweet, bakery-style treat.
products.ingredients: Flour, cocoa, butter, eggs, sugar, white chocolate, vanilla

products.name: Oatmeal Walnut Cookie
products.description: Chewy oats, toasted walnuts, and warm brown sugar flavor for a comforting cookie that feels homemade and hearty.
products.ingredients: Rolled oats, flour, butter, walnuts, brown sugar, eggs, cinnamon

products.name: White Chocolate Cookie
products.description: A soft vanilla cookie folded with creamy white chocolate chunks for a smooth, sweet, melt-in-your-mouth bite.
products.ingredients: Flour, butter, eggs, sugar, white chocolate, vanilla, salt

products.name: Dark Chocolate Cookie
products.description: Deep cocoa flavor with dark chocolate pieces for customers who like their cookies rich, bold, and not too sweet.
products.ingredients: Flour, cocoa, butter, eggs, dark chocolate, sugar, vanilla

products.name: Coffee Crumble
products.description: Coffee-kissed cookie topped with a sweet crumble finish, made for cafe lovers and late-night snack cravings.
products.ingredients: Flour, butter, eggs, coffee, brown sugar, crumble topping, vanilla

products.name: Reese's Peanut Butter Cookie
products.description: Peanut butter cookie packed with chocolatey Reese-inspired goodness, creamy nuttiness, and a soft chewy center.
products.ingredients: Flour, peanut butter, butter, eggs, chocolate, peanuts, sugar

products.name: Matcha Cookie
products.description: Earthy matcha balanced with creamy sweetness, soft texture, and a gentle tea aroma in every bite.
products.ingredients: Flour, matcha powder, butter, eggs, sugar, white chocolate

products.name: Oreo Cookie
products.description: Cookies-and-cream cookie with crushed Oreo bits, a soft center, and playful crunch from edge to edge.
products.ingredients: Flour, butter, eggs, cocoa, Oreo crumbs, sugar, vanilla

products.name: Dubai Chewy Cookie
products.description: A premium chewy cookie inspired by rich pistachio-knafeh flavors, chocolatey luxury, and a gooey dessert-style bite.
products.ingredients: Flour, butter, eggs, chocolate, pistachio cream, toasted pastry, sugar

products.name: S'mores Cookie
products.description: A campfire-style cookie with chocolate, marshmallow, and graham flavor baked into one soft, gooey treat.
products.ingredients: Flour, butter, eggs, chocolate, marshmallow, graham crumbs, sugar
